1.0.1.en: Readme updated. Set device unavailable on error.

1.0.3.en: Added Energy meter for today and this month. Polling fixed setting 1 minute. Better error message display for UI. Added additional logging during pairing.

1.1.0.en: Added inverter detection for type 'tlxh'. Added Meter driver. Added Battery driver.

1.1.1.en: Fixed PV values. Fixed error when multiple devices per plant.

1.1.2.en: Added detection for type 'mix' and 'max'. Added second battery detection. Added detection of no new data coming in. Fix meter and PV for type 'mix'

1.1.3.en: New driver icons. Reduced polling to 5 minutes interval.

1.2.0.en: Improved PV Inverter detection. Added settings to Battery and Meter. Reduced polling to 15 minutes interval. Implemented combined session handling for reduced API calls.

1.2.1.en: Added login images. Fixed 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getAllPlantData')'. Auto logout on failure. Reduced bytes transfer.

1.2.2.en: Added Flow card to force immediate poll.

1.2.3.en: Increased polling to 10 minutes interval. Changed description of poll Flow card.

2.0.0.en: Full rewrite to official Growatt api. Added power limiting through inverter.

2.1.0.en: Added battery charge/discharge control. Added battery_charging_state. Added capability migration from older app versions.

2.2.0.en: Added v1>v2 migration path. Added more devices support. Added second battery support. Reduced 'TOO_FREQUENT' request errors. Improved Inverter curtailment UX. Improved pairing feedback on API issues.

2.2.1.en: Fixed Noah support. Reduced 'TOO_FREQUENT' request errors. Improved pairing feedback on API issues.

2.2.2.en: Fixed inconsistent api inv deviceSn naming.

2.3.0.en: Added support for all global regions. Added more battery support. Added DC Solar and AC Inverter capabilities. Use AC value for Solar power. Added support for target_power inverter. Removed dim capability. Added all translations. Code refactoring. Stability improvements

2.3.1.en: Fix pMax/chargeMax/dischargeMax fetching and settings override. Fix translations.

2.3.2.en: Fix pairing large systems. Fix device naming during pairing. Fix spinner during pairing. Stability improvements.
